untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dynamic parameterization (moving average period from 10-100 days in increments of 10, stop-loss factor from 2-10 in increments of 2) and standard deviation-based stop-loss calculation. Standard deviation is not in the allowed indicators list. Backtest engine must support parameter optimization loops and custom volatility-based stops to fully implement this signal. Using sma_50 as approximation for MA period range and cannot express SD-multiple stops.
translation_notes: Mapped price crosses to sma_50 as central point in the 10-100 range. Exit uses sma_40 as reversal signal. The original signal requires optimization across multiple parameter combinations and a standard deviation stop-loss (not available in indicator list). This translation captures the directional intent but loses the optimization and precise volatility-based exit mechanics.
